title: Chat Bridge
description: Links the chat between two servers or singleplayer worlds.
body:
Discord: StyStatic's Gaming Gamers

Documentation: Chat Bridge Setup Guide

If you cant find a version on the right, try looking in files at the top before complaining in the comments.

 

Introducing the Chat Bridge Minecraft mod, the ultimate solution for connecting the chat of two separate worlds or servers! With Chat Bridge, you can break down the barriers between different Minecraft realms and unite players from different servers in a seamless and immersive chat experience.

 

Imagine being able to chat with your friends on a different server, send messages across different worlds, and connect with players from all over the Minecraft universe. Whether you're playing on a private server with your closest friends, exploring a massive multiplayer server, or participating in an epic modded adventure, Chat Bridge enables you to communicate effortlessly and bridge the gap between worlds.

 

Stay in touch with your friends, coordinate strategies, share resources, and engage in lively conversations, regardless of which server you're on. Keep the excitement alive and never miss out on the latest gossip, thrilling events, or important announcements, as Chat Bridge allows you to stay connected with the Minecraft community like never before.

 

Setting up Chat Bridge is a breeze! Simply install the client mod on one world and the server mod on the other that you want to connect, and easily modify the config files to customize your chat settings. If you're connecting two worlds on different networks, you'll also need to port forward your router to ensure smooth communication between the servers. Don't worry, our comprehensive documentation and step-by-step instructions make the setup process a breeze, even for players who are new to modding. Once set up, Chat Bridge seamlessly bridges the chat between worlds, keeping you connected and in touch with players from different servers like never before. Chat Bridge seamlessly integrates into your Minecraft experience, enhancing your gameplay and expanding your social circle.

 

So why let different servers keep you apart? Break the barriers, connect the chat, and embark on an epic Minecraft adventure with Chat Bridge! Join the conversation and unite the Minecraft community like never before. Get Chat Bridge now and open up a world of possibilities!

Chat Bridge is a new mod, not all of the bugs have been ironed out yet.

Chat Bridge functions in Multiplayer and Singleplayer worlds
